title: Match Hidden Technique to Visual, Layout, Focus, and Access Intent
summary: Build and verify css visible hidden content in shift details and status visibility-state audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css visible hidden content from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css visible hidden content without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

content.text: Display none and the hidden attribute remove content from layout and the accessibility tree. Visibility hidden preserves layout space but removes interaction and accessibility exposure. Opacity zero leaves layout, focus, hit testing, and accessibility behavior unless other properties change. A visually hidden utility keeps text available while clipping its visual box and needs focus exceptions for skip links. Apply it to shift details and status visibility-state audit.
